queries.question: Give me the courses and their durations that each medical school offers.
queries.sql: SELECT Courses.courseName, Courses.duration  from Medical_School_Courses join Courses on Medical_School_Courses.courseId = Courses.id join Medical_Schools on Medical_School_Courses.schoolId = Medical_Schools.id   GROUP BY Medical_School_Courses.courseId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Medical_School_Courses.schoolId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Medical_Schools)

queries.question: Give me the courses and their durations that each medical school offers.
queries.sql: select medical_schools.name , courses.coursename , courses.duration from Medical_School_Courses join Courses on Medical_School_Courses.courseId = Courses.id join Medical_Schools on Medical_School_Courses.schoolId = Medical_Schools.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?coursename ?duration WHERE {
  ?medical_school_courses a :Medical_School_Courses .
  ?courses a :Courses .
  ?medical_school_courses p:hasCourses ?courses .
  ?medical_schools a :Medical_Schools .
  ?medical_school_courses p:hasMedical_Schools ?medical_schools .
  ?medical_schools p:name ?name .
  ?courses p:courseName ?coursename .
  ?courses p:duration ?duration .
}

queries.question: For every medical school, provide the courses they offer
queries.sql: select medical_schools.name , courses.coursename from Medical_School_Courses join Courses on Medical_School_Courses.courseId = Courses.id join Medical_Schools on Medical_School_Courses.schoolId = Medical_Schools.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?coursename WHERE {
  ?medical_school_courses a :Medical_School_Courses .
  ?courses a :Courses .
  ?medical_school_courses p:hasCourses ?courses .
  ?medical_schools a :Medical_Schools .
  ?medical_school_courses p:hasMedical_Schools ?medical_schools .
  ?medical_schools p:name ?name .
  ?courses p:courseName ?coursename .
}

queries.question: Please provide the duration of courses that is consistent across all medical schools.
queries.sql: SELECT Courses.duration  from Medical_School_Courses join Courses on Medical_School_Courses.courseId = Courses.id join Medical_Schools on Medical_School_Courses.schoolId = Medical_Schools.id   GROUP BY Medical_School_Courses.courseId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Medical_School_Courses.schoolId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Medical_Schools)

queries.question: For each medical school, what are the respective durations of their courses?
queries.sql: select medical_schools.name , courses.duration from Medical_School_Courses join Courses on Medical_School_Courses.courseId = Courses.id join Medical_Schools on Medical_School_Courses.schoolId = Medical_Schools.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?duration WHERE {
  ?medical_school_courses a :Medical_School_Courses .
  ?courses a :Courses .
  ?medical_school_courses p:hasCourses ?courses .
  ?medical_schools a :Medical_Schools .
  ?medical_school_courses p:hasMedical_Schools ?medical_schools .
  ?medical_schools p:name ?name .
  ?courses p:duration ?duration .
}

queries.question: What courses do we have at every medical school?
queries.sql: SELECT Courses.courseName  from Medical_School_Courses join Courses on Medical_School_Courses.courseId = Courses.id join Medical_Schools on Medical_School_Courses.schoolId = Medical_Schools.id   GROUP BY Medical_School_Courses.courseId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Medical_School_Courses.schoolId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Medical_Schools)

ambiguous_dsl.question: What courses do we have at every medical school?
What durations are available for courses at each medical school?
Give me the courses and their durations that each medical school offers.
